title: stelis subtilis
intro: Stelis subtilis, also known as the delicate stelis, is a type of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help in treating wounds, skin infections, and other health issues. The health benefits of Stelis subtilis include its ability to improve immune function, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
